key_points: Wisdom means the ability to think carefully and make good decisions
The lesson explains how wise thinking helps people solve problems
Experience and knowledge help people develop wisdom
Patience and careful observation are important qualities of a wise person
Wise decisions help maintain peace and harmony in society
examples: A wise leader listens to others before making a decision
Thinking calmly before reacting to a problem
Solving conflicts through discussion and understanding
Learning from past mistakes to make better choices
Helping others by giving thoughtful advice
concepts: Wisdom → using knowledge and experience to make good decisions
Patience → staying calm before reacting to situations
exam_tips: Understand the meaning of wisdom and why it is important
Remember how wise thinking helps resolve conflicts
Focus on qualities of a wise person such as patience and understanding
Know the moral: wisdom guides people toward better decisions
